title: Ennulle Ennulle Lyrics Valli
stanzas:
Ennulle Ennulle Song Lyrics Valli

Ennulle ennulle 
pala minnal ezhum neram
engengo engengo
en ennam pogum dhooram(2)

naan mei marandhu maara
orr vaarthai illai koora
edhuvo oh..mogam..

Ennulle ennulle 
pala minnal ezhum neram
engengo engengo
en ennam pogum dhooram

kan irandil nooru
vennilaakkal thondrum
aanaalum anal paayum

naadi engum edho
naadha vellam oadum
aanaalum enna raagam

mei silirkkum vannam
thee valarthathenna
thoovam podum neram
thoondil ittathenna

ennaiye kaettu
enninen naan.

Ennulle ennulle 
pala minnal ezhum neram
engengo engengo
en ennam pogum dhooram

Koodu vittu koodu
jeevan paayum podhu
ondril ondraai kalandhaada

oonkalandhu oonum
ondru pada dhiyaanam
aalnilaiyil arangaera

kaalamendra thaeraa
aadidaamal nillu
ikkanathai pole
inbam yaedhu sollu

kaanbavai yaavum
sorgame thaan. 

Ennulle ennulle 
pala minnal ezhum neram
engengo engengo
en ennam pogum dhooram

naan mei marandhu maara
orr vaarthai illai koora
edhuvo oh..mogam..

Ennulle ennulle 
pala minnal ezhum neram
engengo engengo
en ennam pogum dhooram (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ennulle Ennulle'?

The song expresses deep feelings of longing and nostalgia, reflecting on memories and emotions associated with love.

In which movie does 'Ennulle Ennulle' appear?

'Ennulle Ennulle' is featured in the movie Valli.

Who is the singer of 'Ennulle Ennulle'?

The song is sung by the talented Swarnalatha.

Who composed the music for 'Ennulle Ennulle'?

The music for this song was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was 'Ennulle Ennulle' released?

'Ennulle Ennulle' was released on August 20, 1993.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Ennulle Ennulle' from the movie Valli encapsulates the bittersweet emotions of love and longing. Its soothing melody, crafted by Ilaiyaraaja, paired with Swarnalatha's soulful voice, evokes a sense of nostalgia. The lyrics delve into the depths of memory and emotion, making it relatable for anyone who has experienced love. This classic piece remains a cherished favorite for its heartfelt expression and timeless appeal.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennulle Ennulle is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of longing and nostalgia. With Valli as its backdrop, this song showcases the enchanting voice of Swarnalatha, complemented by the masterful composition of Ilaiyaraaja. Its heartfelt lyrics and soothing tune make it a perfect listen for those reflective moments.
stanzaMeanings: In my heart, in my heart, many lightning moments arise from somewhere, somewhere, and my feelings drift away. I have no words to change the truth, whatever it may be. In my heart, in my heart, many lightning moments arise from somewhere, somewhere, and my feelings drift away. Even if a hundred moons appear in the sky, the music flows everywhere, but my melody brings a chill. When the fire of my feelings is ignited, it is the time to call me. In my heart, in my heart, many lightning moments arise from somewhere, somewhere, and my feelings drift away. When life is shared, it becomes one, and when combined, it becomes one. In the flow of life, the time of joy is like a festival. What can I say about the happiness that comes? Everything is heaven. In my heart, in my heart, many lightning moments arise from somewhere, somewhere, and my feelings drift away. I have no words to change the truth, whatever it may be. In my heart, in my heart, many lightning moments arise from somewhere, somewhere, and my feelings drift away.
